name: Fast Cheese Fondues
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Gruyere or Swiss cheese (12 ounces), coarsely shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring shredded Gruyere or Swiss cheese to room temperature.
2. Toss the cheese with flour; set aside.
3. Rub the inside of the fondue pot with garlic halves, then discard the garlic.
4. In a medium saucepan, heat wine over medium heat until small bubbles rise to the surface.
5. Reduce heat to low just prior to the wine boiling. Stir in the cheese a little at a time, stirring constantly and making sure each addition of cheese melts before adding more.
6. Continue stirring until the mixture is bubbling gently.
7. Stir in kirsch or sherry, nutmeg, and white pepper.
8. Transfer the cheese mixture to a warmed fondue pot and keep it bubbling gently.
9. Serve with bread cubes and/or raw vegetables.
For milder flavor, substitute 1/4 cup chicken broth or water for 1/4 cup of wine.
(For an Onion-Cheese Fondue variation, prepare with the ingredients as given above AND stir in 1/2 cup sliced green onion and 1/2 cup shredded carrot into the cheese mixture with the kirsch or sherry.)
